ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mutual_funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutual fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the mutual fund */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the mutual fund */,
  "turnover" REAL /* Annual turnover rate of the mutual fund */,
  "assets_m" REAL /* Total assets under management in millions */,
  "annual_fees" TEXT /* Annual fees charged by the mutual fund */,
  "fund_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund manager */,
  "investment_strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment strategy */,
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset class */,
  "risk_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk level */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date the mutual fund was established */,
  "minimum_investment" REAL /* Minimum amount required to invest in the fund */,
  "dividend_policy" TEXT /* Description of the fund's dividend distribution policy */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the fund's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutual_funds_fund_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_manager_id") REFERENCES fund_managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutual_funds_asset_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_class_id") REFERENCES asset_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutual_funds_investment_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_strategy_id") REFERENCES investment_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutual_funds_risk_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_level_id") REFERENCES risk_levels ("risk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the fund manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fund manager */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the fund manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the fund manager */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* LinkedIn profile URL of the fund manager */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the fund manager's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment strategy */,
  "risk_profile" TEXT /* Description of the risk profile associated with the strategy */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the investment strategy information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset class */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Average volatility of the asset class */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the asset class information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_levels" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk level */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the mutual fund */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk level */,
  "return_expectation" TEXT /* Expected return range for the risk level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the risk level information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutual fund */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance data */,
  "return_rate" REAL /* Annual return rate of the mutual fund */,
  "benchmark_return" REAL /* Return rate of the benchmark index */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha of the mutual fund */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the mutual fund */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the mutual fund */,
  "sortino_ratio" REAL /* Sortino ratio of the mutual fund */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the fund's returns */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown of the fund */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the performance data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_performance_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES mutual_funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "average_growth_rate" REAL /* Average growth rate of the sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the sector information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_sectors" (
  "fund_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund-sector allocation */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutual fund */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "allocation_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of assets allocated to the sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the fund-sector allocation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_sectors_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_sectors_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES mutual_funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., advisor, manager, investor) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was last updated */,
  "initial_investment" REAL /* Initial amount invested in the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_funds" (
  "portfolio_fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio-fund allocation */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutual fund */,
  "allocation_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of assets allocated to the mutual fund */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the mutual fund was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the mutual fund */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the mutual fund in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio-fund allocation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_funds_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES user_portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_funds_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES mutual_funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutual fund */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell, dividend) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction in shares */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share at the time of the transaction */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the transaction information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES user_portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES mutual_funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutual fund */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., performance, news, event) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the alert has been read */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the alert information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES mutual_funds ("fund_id")
)
